creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
At a glance: 

> … The Support page contains a wealth of information about FreeBSD, 
> including mailing lists, user groups, web and FTP sites, …

Happily, no mention of FTP at <https://www.freebsd.org/support/>, however "FTP" is a trigger, a signal that other parts of the page might be outdated. 

> … If you do not have many friends who use FreeBSD, consider using 
> your old FreeBSD CDs to create some more. …

"CD" is another trigger. (Old CDs, really?) USB flash drive, more likely, although use of such drives will become increasingly rare. 

What else? …
